turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Internet Not Working at Home

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi, I’m calling because my internet connection stopped working this afternoon.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I’m sorry to hear that. Let’s see what’s happening. When did you first notice the problem?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: It was about an hour ago. I was working online, and then everything suddenly disconnected.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay, thanks for explaining. Have you tried restarting your modem or router yet?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, I restarted both of them, but it didn’t solve the problem.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. When you look at the modem now, do you see any unusual lights?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, there’s a red blinking light. Normally it’s green.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Just to check, is it blinking quickly or slowly?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Um, slowly. At first I thought it was fast, but it’s actually slow blinking.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thanks for clarifying. That helps. A slow blinking red light usually means a connection issue outside your home. Let me check if there are any service problems in your area.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay, because I wasn’t sure if it was something I did wrong.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I understand. I’ve checked, and there is a temporary outage affecting your area.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Oh, I see. So it’s not only my apartment?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s right. It’s not just your connection.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. So I don’t need to restart it again now, right?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Correct. Restarting again won’t help at the moment.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Alright. Do you know roughly how long it might take to fix?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: The current estimate is about two hours.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Two hours… okay. I’ll check again later tonight.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That sounds good. If it’s still not working after that, please contact us again.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Thank you for explaining everything.
